$uid..write: auth != null && (auth.token.admin === true || (auth.uid === $uid && !data.exists() && newData.hasChildren(['uid','name','email','role','status','rating','createdAt']) && newData.child('uid').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('email').val() === auth.token.email && newData.child('rating').val() === 0 && (newData.child('role').val() === 'buyer' || newData.child('role').val() === 'vendor' || newData.child('role').val() === 'student') && ((newData.child('role').val() === 'vendor' && newData.child('status').val() === 'pending') || (newData.child('role').val() !== 'vendor' && newData.child('status').val() === 'active'))))

!newData.exists() || (newData.hasChildren(['foodId','vendorId','vendorName','name','unitPrice','quantity']) && newData.child('foodId').val() === $foodId && newData.child('vendorId').val() === root.child('foods').child($foodId).child('vendorId').val() && newData.child('unitPrice').val() === root.child('foods').child($foodId).child('price').val() && newData.child('quantity').isNumber() && newData.child('quantity').val() >= 1 && newData.child('quantity').val() <= 20)
